commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=712ef9a115faebc59fca0d1781c236dd928c5aad)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds overloaded-only same-auth-profile retry handling to embedded prompt and assistant failover, adds a trace result, and extends focused failover tests.

PR surface: Source +52, Tests +81. Total +133 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main rotates once for overloaded failures, then surfaces the error when no fallback is configured and no profile can advance. The linked issue logs show that same overloaded provider failure reaching the user-visible error path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs maintainer review because the default retry budget/backoff is a provider policy choice and the contributor still needs real behavior proof beyond the mock harness.

target.title: fix(agents): retry transient provider errors when single profile has no fallback
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes single-profile transient provider failures so `overloaded`, `rate_limit`, and `server_error` assistant-side failures can retry the same auth profile when no model fallback is configured.

This keeps existing behavior for non-transient auth/billing failures and for sessions that do have configured model fallbacks.

Closes #84236

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** Retry transient provider errors on the same auth profile when only one profile exists and no model fallback is configured, instead of stopping the embedded agent immediately.
- **Real environment tested:** Linux RHEL 8 (kernel 4.19.112), Node v22.22.0, worktree `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/pr-84265`, HEAD `712ef9a115faebc59fca0d1781c236dd928c5aad`, isolated temporary agent/workspace directories under `/tmp/openclaw-84265-proof-*`.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:**
  1. `OPENCLAW_PROOF_WORKTREE="$TASK_WORKTREE" pnpm exec vitest run --root "$EVIDENCE_DIR" --config "$EVIDENCE_DIR/vitest.proof.config.mjs" --reporter=verbose`
  2. `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/failover-policy.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/assistant-failover.test.ts`
  3. `pnpm check:test-types`
- **Evidence after fix:**
```text
OPENCLAW_84265_RETRY_PROOF {
  "attemptLog": [
    { "provider": "openai", "modelId": "mock-1", "authProfileId": "openai:p1", "outcome": "overloaded_error" },
    { "provider": "openai", "modelId": "mock-1", "authProfileId": "openai:p1", "outcome": "success" }
  ],
  "executionTrace": {
    "winnerProvider": "openai",
    "winnerModel": "mock-1",
    "attempts": [
      { "provider": "openai", "model": "mock-1", "result": "same_profile_retry", "reason": "overloaded", "stage": "assistant" },
      { "provider": "openai", "model": "mock-1", "result": "success", "stage": "assistant" }
    ],
    "fallbackUsed": true,
    "runner": "embedded"
  },
  "payloadText": "same profile retry ok"
}

✓ same-profile-retry.proof.test.ts > retries an overloaded provider response on the same profile when no model fallback exists
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  1 passed (1)

$ pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/failover-policy.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/assistant-failover.test.ts
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  55 passed (55)

$ pnpm check:test-types
exit 0
```
- **Observed result after fix:** The embedded runner selected the only auth profile (`openai:p1`), received an `overloaded_error`, recorded `same_profile_retry`, retried the same provider/model/profile, and then returned a successful assistant payload. The focused failover regression tests also pass.
- **What was not tested:** A live third-party provider outage in a real chat channel. The proof uses the embedded runner session path with a controllable provider-attempt boundary so the transient overloaded response is deterministic and the same-profile retry trace is observable.

## Regression Test Plan

- **Target test file:** `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/failover-policy.test.ts`, `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/assistant-failover.test.ts`, and the same-profile retry proof harness shown above.
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/failover-policy.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/assistant-failover.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- Same-profile retry proof command shown above, exercising `runEmbeddedAgent` and verifying the resulting execution trace.

## Root Cause

- **Root cause:** The retry-limit policy only escalated replay-safe transient reasons to model fallback. When no fallback model was configured and auth-profile rotation could not advance, transient provider failures were surfaced instead of allowing a bounded retry on the same profile.
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt
